name: kumo-compiler
description: Private Kumo compiler and proof application.

scripts.build:runtimes: npm run compile && node scripts/build-from-manifest.mjs runtimes
scripts.build:button: npm run compile:button && node scripts/build-from-manifest.mjs button
scripts.build:dialog: npm run compile:dialog && node scripts/build-from-manifest.mjs dialog && node scripts/publish-runtime-family.mjs dialog
scripts.deploy:prepare: npm run build:runtimes && npm run catalog:build
scripts.proof:select: npm run build:runtimes && node proof/select-proof.mjs && npm run package:verify && npm run catalog:validate
scripts.proof:button: npm run build:button && node proof/button-proof.mjs && npm run package:verify && npm run catalog:validate
scripts.proof:dialog: npm run build:dialog && node proof/dialog-proof.mjs && npm run package:verify && npm run catalog:validate
scripts.build:native-controls: npm run compile:native-controls && node scripts/build-from-manifest.mjs native-controls
scripts.proof:native-controls: npm run build:native-controls && node proof/native-control-proof.mjs && npm run package:verify && npm run catalog:validate
scripts.build:popover: npm run compile:popover && node scripts/build-from-manifest.mjs popover && node scripts/publish-runtime-family.mjs popover
scripts.proof:popover: npm run build:popover && node proof/popover-proof.mjs && npm run package:verify && npm run catalog:validate
scripts.directory:validate: npm --prefix astro run build && node scripts/validate-directory.mjs
scripts.build:form: npm run compile:form && node scripts/build-from-manifest.mjs form && node scripts/form-index.mjs
scripts.proof:form: npm run build:form && node proof/form-proof.mjs && npm run package:verify && npm run catalog:validate
scripts.build:navigation: npm run compile:navigation && node scripts/build-from-manifest.mjs navigation
scripts.proof:navigation: npm run build:navigation && node proof/navigation-proof.mjs && npm run package:verify && npm run catalog:validate
scripts.build:kumo:vue: npm run compile:kumo && node scripts/build-from-manifest.mjs kumo-vue
scripts.proof:kumo:react: npm run build:kumo:react && node proof/catalog-browser-proof.mjs --frameworks=react && node scripts/audit-kumo-react.mjs
scripts.proof:kumo:solid: npm run build:kumo:solid && npm run verify:kumo:solid
scripts.build:kumo:svelte: npm run compile:kumo:svelte && node scripts/build-from-manifest.mjs kumo-svelte
scripts.proof:kumo:svelte: npm run build:kumo:svelte && npm run verify:kumo:svelte && npm run package:verify && npm run catalog:validate
scripts.build:data-presentational: npm run compile:data-presentational && node scripts/build-from-manifest.mjs data-presentational
scripts.proof:data-presentational: npm run build:data-presentational && node proof/data-presentational-proof.mjs && npm run package:verify && npm run catalog:validate
scripts.build:selection-command-date: npm run compile:selection-command-date && node scripts/build-from-manifest.mjs selection-command-date
scripts.proof:selection-command-date: npm run build:selection-command-date && npm run verify:kumo:vue && npm run package:verify && npm run catalog:validate
scripts.release:check: npm test && npm run evidence:validate && npm run build:migration-status && npm run catalog:validate && npm --prefix astro run build && node scripts/validate-astro-routes.mjs
